---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's the pain point?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other approaches? Why is this one better?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or references that help explain the idea.
